branch.branch_summary: Implement TASK-073 review-provenance-audit: a safe_read verifier that fails when implementation-grade work claims Guardian/Council review without resolvable maker/checker/council provenance. Verification gate: negative fixture with self-attested or missing review provenance must fail plus unit tests and command help metadata. Stop condition: audit-only scope; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of review provenance, not proof that the review was semantically correct.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-073 sits on v6.7 after shipped v6.6.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.7 Verifiable Governance: make missing archmap impact dispositions, self-attested review provenance, and low-independence evidence machine-detectable so release sign-off can fail on structural self-attestation instead of trusting maker claims.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-073: v6.7 frontier: review provenance audit
